source_files.pdf: Generated `specs.md` from official manufacturer URLs previously stored in `pdf.txt`
source_files.finance: Generated from official Mercedes-Benz pricing and finance pages

finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: MBUSA.com lists a starting price of $47,250 before destination, taxes, title, registration, dealer fees, and optional equipment.
finance_snapshot.apr: Mercedes-Benz financing and lease programs vary by model, region, term, and approved credit; check official special offers and MBFS for current programs.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use Mercedes-Benz dealer quoting or Mercedes-Benz Financial Services tools for current payment estimates.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by approved credit, taxes, fees, incentives, and deal structure.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Lease estimates vary by model, mileage allowance, region, and current official programs.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by taxes, fees, first payment, incentives, and retailer structure.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Mercedes-Benz special offers can change frequently and should be confirmed with a local retailer.
finance_snapshot.warranty: See Mercedes-Benz owner and service resources for current warranty and maintenance details.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Shoppers entering the Mercedes sedan lineup who want a lower starting point than larger sedans.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Accessible Mercedes sedan entry point with strong style-led appeal.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Once packages are added, the price gap versus the C-Class can narrow fast.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Mercedes-Benz USA pricing and official finance pages on March 26, 2026.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle. Local image is downloaded from the official Mercedes-Benz USA hero asset.
